name: pordee
description: พอดี — Thai+English terse mode for Claude Code and Codex. Cuts ~60-75% of tokens while keeping technical accuracy.

scripts.test: node --test tests/test_activate.js tests/test_state.js tests/test_tracker.js tests/test_triggers.js && node tests/test_benchmark.js && node tests/test_pordee_stats.js && node plugins/pordee-codex/scripts/test-hook.js && node plugins/pordee-codex/scripts/test-force-ultra-hook.js

author: Vatunyoo Suwannapisit
